_comment: Maps misspelled or alternate camp names to their canonical display name. Applied across scripts/dedupe-events.php, admin/reconcile-sheet.php, changelog.php, and index.html (client-side dedup). Keys and values are display names; matching is done on canonical form (lowercased, accents stripped, leading 'The'/trailing 'Camp' removed, alpha-only). Add a new entry whenever a typo or alternate name lands and you don't want it to keep coming back as a duplicate camp. The value is the name that should be kept; the key is the variant to fold into it.
